Party_Details.Name: MCH International Pte Ltd

Facts.Text: MCH International Pte Ltd was incorporated in Singapore.
MCH International Pte Ltd entered into a Shareholders Agreement with YG Group Pte Ltd and YG Logistics Pte Ltd.
MCH International Pte Ltd entered into a Subscription Agreement with YG Group Pte Ltd and YG Logistics Pte Ltd.
MCH International Pte Ltd entered into a Loan Agreement with YG Logistics Pte Ltd.
MCH International Pte Ltd amended the Loan Agreement with YG Logistics Pte Ltd.

Party_Details.Issue: Whether MCH International Pte Ltd is legally responsible for the stated conspiracy and contravention of agreements.
Party_Details.Rule: A company is bound by the terms of its agreements and may be held responsible for actions taken by its controlling individuals if those actions contravene the agreements.
Party_Details.Application: The Plaintiff argued that the Defendants engaged in actions that disrupted the business operations and contravened the agreements. The Defendants contended that the agreements were not contravened and that the actions were justified.
Party_Details.Judicial_Reasoning_Log: The court found that MCH International Pte Ltd was not liable for the alleged breaches as the agreements were not contravened in the manner claimed by the Plaintiff.

Party_Details.Name: YG Group Pte Ltd

Facts.Text: YG Group Pte Ltd was incorporated in Singapore.
YG Group Pte Ltd entered into a Shareholders Agreement with MCH International Pte Ltd and YG Logistics Pte Ltd.
YG Group Pte Ltd entered into a Subscription Agreement with MCH International Pte Ltd and YG Logistics Pte Ltd.
YG Group Pte Ltd amended the Subscription Agreement with MCH International Pte Ltd and YG Logistics Pte Ltd.
YG Group Pte Ltd executed a Sale and Purchase Agreement with the Vendors.

Party_Details.Issue: Whether YG Group Pte Ltd is legally responsible for the stated conspiracy and contravention of agreements.
Party_Details.Rule: A company is bound by the terms of its agreements and may be held responsible for actions taken by its controlling individuals if those actions contravene the agreements.
Party_Details.Application: The Defendant argued that the actions taken were within the scope of the agreements and necessary for business operations. The Plaintiff contended that these actions contravened the agreements and caused harm.
Party_Details.Judicial_Reasoning_Log: The court found that YG Group Pte Ltd was not liable for the alleged breaches as the actions were within the scope of the agreements and did not contravene them.

Party_Details.Name: MCH International Pte Ltd

Facts.Text: MCH International Pte Ltd entered into a Loan Agreement with YG Logistics Pte Ltd.
MCH International Pte Ltd amended the Loan Agreement with YG Logistics Pte Ltd.
MCH International Pte Ltd was sued by YG Logistics Pte Ltd in Suit 104 of 2016.
MCH International Pte Ltd failed to recognize the appointment of Mr. Tan as proxy.

Party_Details.Issue: Whether MCH International Pte Ltd can claim damages for the stated conspiracy and contravention of agreements.
Party_Details.Rule: A company may claim damages if it can prove that the actions of another party contravened the agreements and caused financial harm.
Party_Details.Application: The Plaintiff by counterclaim argued that the Defendants' actions were in contravention of the agreements and caused financial harm. The Defendants contended that their actions were justified and within the scope of the agreements.
Party_Details.Judicial_Reasoning_Log: The court found that MCH International Pte Ltd could not claim damages as the actions of the Defendants were within the scope of the agreements and did not cause financial harm.

Party_Details.Name: YG Logistics Pte Ltd

Facts.Text: YG Logistics Pte Ltd entered into a Loan Agreement with MCH International Pte Ltd.
YG Logistics Pte Ltd amended the Loan Agreement with MCH International Pte Ltd.
YG Logistics Pte Ltd initiated Suit 104 of 2016 against MCH International Pte Ltd.
YG Logistics Pte Ltd exercised its rights under the Deed of Share Charge.

Party_Details.Issue: Whether YG Logistics Pte Ltd is legally responsible for the stated conspiracy and contravention of agreements.
Party_Details.Rule: A company is bound by the terms of its agreements and may be held responsible for actions taken by its controlling individuals if those actions contravene the agreements.
Party_Details.Application: The Defendant by counterclaim argued that the actions taken were within the scope of the agreements and necessary for business operations. The Plaintiff by counterclaim contended that these actions contravened the agreements and caused harm.
Party_Details.Judicial_Reasoning_Log: The court found that YG Logistics Pte Ltd was not liable for the alleged breaches as the actions were within the scope of the agreements and did not contravene them.
